use_cases: Secure one-time password entry for two-factor authentication flows
Phone or email verification code input during account registration
Login authentication with short numeric codes
Transaction approval codes in banking applications
ai_summary: A Shadcn UI-inspired OTP (One-Time Password) input component featuring individual slots for digit entry, animated caret display, and focus ring states. Built on the input-otp library with React Context for state management. Includes comprehensive accessibility support with ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation for verification workflows like 2FA, phone/email validation, and secure authentication.
